page: Microsoft Azure E32-16ads_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the Eadsv7 server family. It is powered by an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor using the x86_64 architecture, operating at a clock speed of 4.5 GHz. The server features 16 dedicated virtual CPUs mapped to 8 physical cores with 2 threads per core. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 16 GB per vCPU. Additionally, the instance includes 1890 GB of local NVMe SSD storage and is premium storage capable, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

Performance benchmarks indicate top-tier single-core capabilities. The AMD EPYC processor achieves top 10% performance in stress-ng single-core CPU tests, single-threaded gzip compression, and single-threaded bzip3 decompression. Multi-core performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations fall within the average tier. Large-scale LLM inference, such as prompt processing with a 70B model, is a notable bottleneck, registering in the bottom 10% due to the lack of dedicated GPU acceleration. However, text generation with smaller 135M models shows strong performance in the top 25%.

This server offers high resource density, making it a qualitatively cost-efficient option for memory-intensive workloads that do not require massive parallel multi-core scaling. The combination of 256.0 GB of RAM and 1890 GB of local storage makes it highly suitable for relational databases, in-memory caching systems, data analytics, and memory-heavy enterprise applications.
description: Microsoft Azure E32-16ads_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the Eadsv7 family, powered by an x86_64 AMD EPYC 9V45 processor running at 4.5 GHz. It features 16 dedicated vCPUs, 8 physical cores, 256.0 GB of RAM, and 1890 GB of local storage. Operating on Microsoft Hyper-V, this server delivers top-tier single-core CPU performance and single-threaded compression speeds, while multi-core and memory bandwidth metrics remain in the average tier. With a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 16 GB per core, it is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-bound workloads. It is highly suited for database hosting, in-memory caching, and data-intensive enterprise applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E32-16ads_v7 is a memory-optimized server featuring 16 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 1890 GB local storage, delivering top-tier single-core performance for databases.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring high-capacity local storage and top-tier single-core AMD EPYC processing performance.

256.0 GB of system memory providing a high 16 GB per vCPU ratio
1890 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Top-tier single-core CPU and single-threaded compression performance
Best suited for memory-intensive databases and in-memory caching
